description: You have a working TipCalculatorApp project. The app features an EditText (id: cost_of_service), a RadioGroup for tip percentages (15% id: option_fifteen_percent, 18% id: option_eighteen_percent, 20% id: option_twenty_percent), a Switch for rounding (id: round_up_switch), a calculate Button (id: calculate_button), and a TextView for the result (id: tip_result). Configure the project for instrumented UI testing using Espresso (3.5.1) and AndroidX Test (junit 1.1.5). Create a test class MainActivityEspressoTest.kt in app/src/androidTest/java/com/example/tipcalculator/ and implement UI tests to verify the calculate button is displayed on launch, the 18% tip calculation for a 50.00 bill, the round-up switch visibility and toggle functionality, and the default 15% tip calculation. Ensure the project builds successfully with ./gradlew assembleAndroidTest.
